user_story: As a System admin, I want to see the last activity sync date for Wrike logs, so that I know when data was most recently synchronized
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Sync Wrike Logs screen; When the page loads; Then the last activity sync date is displayed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to see the job running frequency for the Wrike sync, so that I understand how often logs are automatically synchronized
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Sync Wrike Logs screen; When the page loads; Then the job running frequency is displayed
